strategic_objective: Clarify the representational skew and its implications in the Destination Port feature distribution
key_checks: analyze class-conditioned distribution profiles and entropy measures for Destination Port
investigate the prevalence and role of the dominant port in DDoS traffic
assess potential dataset biases or artifacts influencing port distribution
consider effects of skew on generalization to other attack types or ports
success_criteria: evidence distinguishing targeted attack vector from dataset artifact
understanding of how skewed port representation affects detection robustness
identification of conditions under which port distribution may limit generalization
